title: 第 20 課｜小角度散射：用微擾法直接算偏轉｜Landau–Lifshitz 經典力學
description:
當撞擊參數很大、位能很弱時，粒子只被輕輕推偏。本課用微擾法在實驗室系直接計算小角度散射：由橫向衝量 Δp⊥ = ∫ F⊥ dt 求出散射角，把對 x 的積分換成對 r 的積分，導出 χ = −[2b/(m·v∞²)]·∫(dU/dr)dr/√(r²−b²)，再代回 dσ = (b/χ)·|db/dχ|·dΩ 得到弱場散射的微分截面。

本影片為《Landau–Lifshitz 經典力學》教學系列第 20 課（繁體中文版）。

title: Lesson 20 | Small-Angle Scattering by Perturbation | Landau–Lifshitz
description:
When the impact parameter is large and the potential weak, a particle is only gently deflected. This lesson computes small-angle scattering directly in the laboratory frame: from the transverse impulse Δp⊥ = ∫ F⊥ dt it finds the scattering angle, converts the x-integral into an r-integral, and derives χ = −[2b/(m·v∞²)]·∫(dU/dr)dr/√(r²−b²), then substitutes into dσ = (b/χ)·|db/dχ|·dΩ for the weak-field differential cross-section.

Lesson 20 of the Landau–Lifshitz Classical Mechanics teaching series (English edition).
